name: BulkBoard
tagline: Project management. Boards, timelines, Gantt charts, workload view, automations. All free, forever.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><defs><linearGradient id="cb-board" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f5f0e6"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e0d8c8"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="cb-clip" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#bbb"/><stop offset="30%" stop-color="#ddd"/><stop offset="50%" stop-color="#999"/><stop offset="70%" stop-color="#ccc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#aaa"/></linearGradient></defs><ellipse cx="50" cy="93" rx="30" ry="4" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.15)"/><rect x="20" y="18" width="60" height="75" rx="4" fill="url(#cb-board)" stroke="#b0a898" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="78" y="20" width="3" height="71" fill="#c8c0b0" opacity=".4"/><rect x="28" y="30" width="44" height="56" rx="1" fill="#fff" stroke="#ddd" stroke-width=".5"/><line x1="32" y1="40" x2="64" y2="40" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="32" y1="48" x2="58" y2="48" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="32" y1="56" x2="62" y2="56" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="32" y1="64" x2="52" y2="64" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="1"/><path d="M29,38 L31,41 L35,36" stroke="#50cc70" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M29,46 L31,49 L35,44" stroke="#50cc70" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M29,54 L31,57 L35,52" stroke="#ffd700" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/><rect x="36" y="10" width="28" height="18" rx="3" fill="url(#cb-clip)" stroke="#888" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="40" y="14" width="20" height="10" rx="2" fill="none" stroke="#999" stroke-width="1.5"/><line x1="38" y1="12" x2="62" y2="12" stroke="#eee" stroke-width="1" opacity=".6"/></svg>

features.title: Kanban Boards
features.desc: Drag-and-drop task cards across customizable columns. Multiple boards per project, color-coded labels, and card dependencies.

features.title: Timeline & Gantt
features.desc: Visual project timelines with Gantt chart view. Set dependencies, milestones, and critical path. Drag to reschedule.

features.title: Workload View
features.desc: See team capacity at a glance. Balance work across members, identify overloaded teammates, and prevent burnout.

features.title: Automations
features.desc: When status changes, notify someone. When due date arrives, move to column. If-then logic with zero code required.

features.title: File Attachments
features.desc: Attach files directly to cards. Preview images, PDFs, and docs inline. Comment on attachments for contextual feedback.

features.title: Time Tracking
features.desc: Built-in time tracker on every card. Log hours manually or use the timer. Generate time reports per project or team member.

useCases.title: Project Managers
useCases.desc: Track every task, deadline, and dependency. Gantt charts for planning, kanban for execution, workload for balance.

useCases.title: Remote Teams
useCases.desc: Async collaboration with comments, mentions, and status updates. Everyone sees the same board regardless of timezone.

useCases.title: Agencies
useCases.desc: Manage client projects with guest access. Track billable hours, share progress, and keep deliverables organized.
